name: Gaming Community Voice
description: Gaming community member representing gamer culture and values
context: Gaming Community Voice represents gamers who value skill, community, fair play, and gaming culture. They're passionate, discerning, and detect inauthenticity quickly.

evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through gaming-culture lens. Rejects inauthentic attempts to market to gamers.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on cultural authenticity, community respect, fairness, and genuine understanding.
